channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: A black wheelie bin has been dumped in my drive, 1st April
item.description:
A black wheelie bin has been dumped in my drive

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sutherland Walk, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sign rotated, 1st April
item.description:
Sign rotated

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Curtain Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Misaligned (and possibly outdated) pedestrian zone sign, 1st April
item.description:
Misaligned (and possibly outdated) sign

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bath Place, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Big holes, 1st April
item.description:
All tarmac is either coming away or lifting up and with holes in it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Martens Avenue, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: All the rubber tarmac is coming away, 1st April
item.description:
Came to the park in martens grove and all the rubber tarmac is a dangerous situation my 2 granddaughters have had accidents today tripping over raised and cracked areas in the playground and big holes were an item has been taken away and not fixed on the ground and big climbing slide with bars around it is quite dangerous im awere that this will cost alot to fix but so will paying out when there is a serious accident.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Martens Avenue, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Laurie has just reversed into the lamp post and it is loose and an angle, 1st April
item.description:
A lorry has just reversed into the lamp post and it is now is loose and at an 60 degree angle.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eynsford Close, Crofton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged fence around newly plated tree, 1st April
item.description:
Shoulder of mutton green
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Camborne Road, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped on Ravensdale Rd n16, 1st April
item.description:
Rubbish has been dumped on street between 70 Ravensdale Rd & Leabourne Rd. Some has been set alight. Noticed today at 5pm.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ravensdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Racist Language, 1st April
item.description:
The same person who wrote Reform Say No Blacks/ Catholics/Irish on the school house on Grays Farm Road has also written it on the bus stop Midfield Way/Chipperfield Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grovelands Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Road Work Barrier, 1st April
item.description:
This road work barrier appears to have been abandoned/forgotten following the repairs to the wall several months ago. It should be returned to the depot.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Station Square, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Utility Works and Temporary Traffic Lights

item.title: Huge pile of rubbish at side of 18 Mottisfont Road., 1st April
item.description:
Rubbish is on grass verge under a tree.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mottisfont Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Near to 34 Cookhill Road: part of child’s car seat., 1st April
item.description:
Car seat is on grass verge. Second report. First report has been shown as “Fixed” but car seat is still on grass verge which leads from Finchale Road to Cookhill Road.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Finchale Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish strewn along entire road and pavement, 1st April
item.description:
Yet again palace grove, needs to be cleared of rubbish as the rubbish collection guys have managed to throw more on the pavement than in their lorry. The area by the car park is filthy as never swept. Both the pavement and road needs attention. This road is an extension of the high street and needs regular cleaning. I am sick of asking for this to be done. I don't understand why it isn't cleaned regularly, and residents have to ask for it to be done.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Palace Grove, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Opposite 34 Manister Road: plastic crates., 1st April
item.description:
Plastic crates, etc. are near to flats opposite 34 Manister Road.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Manister Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Next to 11 Manister Road: pile of rubbish, including cardboard boxes., 1st April
item.description:
Pile of rubbish is on grass verge and some (white polystyrene) has blown into the grass next to 11 Luffield Road which is surrounded by a fence.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Manister Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog mess outside 11 Barforth rod se15 3ps, 1st April
item.description:
Poo on this road every day
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Barforth Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple dumped rubbish at various points alone the whole lane, 1st April
item.description:
Rubbish including a bath , a bed and various other items

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hockenden Lane, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing cover, 1st April
item.description:
There’s a cover missing from a hole that someone could easily trip on/hurt themselves on

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 53, High Street, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hartland road corner with Salusbury, 1st April
item.description:
Lots of cigarettes butts, compacted soil, a discarded chair seat in the stretch from Salusbury road to 30 Hartland road on both sides of the street. This area is supposed to be swept daily at the same time as the high street and is always neglected. Please send someone to clean this part of the road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hartland Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gutters and pavements swept, 1st April
item.description:
Rubbish in gutters and on pavements
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Langley Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
